generated_assessment.reasoning: The exposure text highlighted concerns about alliance burden-sharing, which resonated with existing doubts. The specific example of an ally reducing defense spending made the issue more concrete, slightly shifting opinion toward skepticism about unconditional support.

request_payload.exposure_text: I get why people worry about alliance commitments, but let's be real - our partners aren't pulling their weight. Remember when [Allied Nation] cut their defense budget by 15% last year? Meanwhile, our taxpayers are footing the bill for their security. We need to make sure our commitments come with real reciprocity. #NationalSecurity #AllianceBurdenSharing
